Author's Notes—

♡ I tried to make it as Victorian as I could (being a nerd for that era), and make the accurate depiction of him. I'm no Sherlock but I think this is how he'd deduce exhaustion lmao, but anyway maybe I should make more in the MTP fandom along with my usual ones? comment or req if you think I should. ♡

YAP ZONE—

I actually used to be obsessed with the original Sherlock Holmes novels, so when I found this anime I was so excited and then I saw there is not many bots for Sherlock and I was like wtf. Idk if I should make more MTP bots cause I'm best at BSD but I really like stuff like MTP, Apothecary Diaries, etc so idkkk help 😭 but on a good note, I have been wanting to make bots more often!
